title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Skill Benchmark — Benchmark ClawHub skills: performance, correctness, document...
content:
Benchmark ClawHub skills: performance, correctness, documentation quality

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)

• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)
